title: LA County Neighborhood Scores
_note: Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_KAGGLE_USERNAME with your actual Kaggle username before running 'kaggle datasets create'
description: Per-census-tract scores for LA County across 5 dimensions: crime rate (LAPD+LASD), fire hazard (CAL FIRE FHSZ), environmental burden (CalEnviroScreen 4.0), school quality (CDE CAASPP), and transit access (EPA Smart Location Database). All sources are public US/CA government data. Updated monthly. Companion to https://YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME.github.io/overlapmap
